products.name: Fırın Sütlaç
products.description: Taş fırında üzeri kızartılmış, hafif ve lezzetli geleneksel Türk sütlacı.
products.description_en: Traditional Turkish rice pudding, light and delicious, baked in a stone oven with a browned top.
products.description_ar: بودينغ الأرز التركي التقليدي الخفيف واللذيذ، محمر وجهه في فرن حجري.

products.name: Künefe
products.description: Sıcak şerbetli, içi uzayan özel künefe peyniri ve üstü bol Antep fıstıklı çıtır tatlı.
products.description_en: A crispy dessert with a special künefe cheese filling, soaked in warm syrup, and topped with plenty of pistachios.
products.description_ar: حلوى مقرمشة بقطر ساخن، محشوة بجبنة الكنافة الخاصة الذائبة ومغطاة بوفرة من فستق عنتاب.

products.name: Yayık Ayranı
products.description: Köpüklü, soğuk ve taze yayık ayranı.
products.description_en: Frothy, cold, and fresh ayran.

products.name: Pide Dürüm Tavuk Döner
products.description: Saray usulü, pide arası tavuk döner, domates ve soğan...
products.description_en: Palace-style, chicken doner kebab in pita bread, with tomatoes and onions...
products.description_ar: شاورما دجاج داخل خبز البيدو على الطريقة السراية، مع الطماطم والبصل...

products.name: Hatay Usulü Tavuk Döner
products.description: Özel soslu lavaş içerisine, kornişon turşu, patates kızartması, mayonez, salça sosu ve tavuk döner...
products.description_en: A special flatbread filled with gherkins, french fries, mayonnaise, tomato sauce, and chicken doner kebab...
products.description_ar: شاورما دجاج داخل خبز الصاج مع صلصة خاصة، مخلل كورنيشون، بطاطس مقلية، مايونيز وصلصة طماطم...

products.name: Pilav Üstü Tavuk Döner
products.description: Pilav üstü tavuk döner, salata ve soğan söğüşü ile birlikte.
products.description_en: Chicken doner kebab served with rice, salad, and sliced ​​onions.
products.description_ar: شاورما دجاج تقدم فوق الأرز، مع السلطة وسلطة البصل المتبل.

products.name: Porsiyon Tavuk Döner
products.description: Porsiyon tavuk döner, salata ve soğan söğüşü ile birlikte.
products.description_en: A portion of chicken doner kebab, served with salad and sliced ​​onions.
products.description_ar: وجبة شاورما دجاج تقدم مع السلطة وسلطة البصل المتبل.

products.name: İskender Tavuk Döner
products.description: Altında tırnak pide, üstünde nefis  tavuk döner, özel domates sosu, tereyağı ve tava yoğurdu...
products.description_en: Underneath, it's flatbread, topped with delicious chicken doner kebab, special tomato sauce, butter, and strained yogurt...
products.description_ar: خبز البيدو التركي المقرمش في الأسفل، تعلوه شاورما الدجاج اللذيذة، مع صلصة الطماطم الخاصة، الزبدة المذابة ولبن الزبادي...

products.description_en: A legendary soda that brings traditional flavor to modern tables...

products.description: Doğal mineral zenginliği ve yalın lezzetiyle ferahlığın en saf hali.

products.name: Meyveli Soda
products.description: Doğal maden suyunun canlı meyve aromalarıyla buluştuğu ferahlatıcı bir lezzet deneyimi.
products.description_en: A refreshing taste experience where natural mineral water meets vibrant fruit flavors.

settings.welcomeDesc: Eşsiz baharatlar ve taze malzemelerle hazırlanan saray lezzetlerine hoş geldiniz.
settings.welcomeDesc_en: Welcome to the palace flavors, prepared with unique spices and fresh ingredients.
settings.welcomeDesc_ar: مرحبًا بكم في نكهات السرايا المحضرة بالبهارات الفريدة والمكونات الطازجة.
